overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player driving through Night City at night during light rain. The vehicle navigates neon-lit streets, passes under overpasses, follows a black van through intersections, and stops at a red traffic light. The scene features characteristic cyberpunk aesthetics with holographic advertisements, wet reflective roads, and dense urban architecture.

concrete overpass bridge spanning the road ahead
tall futuristic buildings with neon accents and holographic elements
commercial structures with glowing signage and glass facades

segments.scene_description: Driving through a rain-slicked neon-lit commercial district in Night City. The vehicle approaches a large blue neon HOTEL sign and enters a covered underpass structure. The wet asphalt reflects the pink and cyan neon lights from surrounding cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown commercial district with large holographic advertisements

making right turn at intersection while accelerating

agents.ego_description: accelerating through open city streets, passing large holographic billboards and glass office towers

tall modern skyscrapers with reflective glass surfaces
large vertical digital displays on building facades

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass into a wide-open downtown district dominated by towering glass office buildings and massive holographic billboards. The vehicle accelerates through multi-lane streets, navigating past neon storefronts and digital advertisement screens while the rain creates reflective patterns on the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown arterial road with commercial buildings and traffic signals

segments.scene_description: Following a black van through the dense urban core of Night City, passing under elevated highway structures and alongside towering commercial buildings with vertical billboards. The vehicle maintains a steady pace through the rain-soaked streets, navigating past traffic signals and neon-lit storefronts while approaching an upcoming intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with red traffic light, stopped behind black van

events.description: stopping at red traffic light behind black van
vehicle comes to complete stop at intersection

agents.ego_description: stopped at red light behind black van, waiting for traffic signal to change

yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle slows to a stop at a red traffic light behind the black van, positioned at a marked pedestrian crosswalk. The intersection is surrounded by neon-lit commercial buildings, with the red traffic signal glowing brightly against the dark rainy night. The scene ends with the vehicle waiting at the standstill, raindrops visible on the windshield.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a rain-slicked commercial district that gradually opens into a towering downtown cityscape. It begins by navigating streets reflecting pink and cyan neon lights, moving toward a large blue hotel sign before entering the shadow of a covered underpass. As the vehicle emerges from the structure, the enclosed space gives way to a wide-open urban corridor dominated by massive glass office buildings. The scene then expands into a multi-lane thoroughfare where the camera accelerates past holographic billboards and digital advertisement screens, with the rain creating shimmering reflective patterns across the asphalt.

The shot follows a continuous drive through the dense urban core of Night City that transitions from a steady pursuit into a sudden standstill. It begins by trailing a black van beneath elevated highway structures and towering commercial buildings adorned with vertical billboards. As the vehicle navigates the rain-soaked streets, the camera glides past neon-lit storefronts and traffic signals while maintaining a constant pace toward an upcoming intersection. The scene then shifts as the vehicle slows down, eventually coming to a complete stop behind the van at a marked pedestrian crosswalk. Finally, the camera lingers at the red traffic light, which glows brightly against the dark rainy night while raindrops streak across the windshield.
